title: ACI 318-19 Concrete Shear Wall Design
description: Design reinforced concrete walls in accordance with ACI 318-19.

L.description: Length (L). Units: mm. Length of wall.

H.description: Height (H). Units: mm. Height of Wall.

W.description: Width (W). Units: mm. Width of wall.

cover.description: Cover. Units: mm. Concrete cover measured to outside of transverse reinforcement.

N_bl.description: Nbl. Symbol: N_{bl}. Units: #. Bar number of longitudinal reinforcement.

no_L_Bars.description: No. of Rows. Symbol: N_{rows}. Number of longitudinal bar rows.

long_Spacing.description: Sl. Symbol: S_l. Units: mm. Equivalent spacing based on number of longitudinal bars.

N_bt.description: Nbt. Symbol: N_{bt}. Units: #. Bar number of transverse reinforcement.

S_t.description: St. Units: mm. Spacing of transverse reinforcement.

f_c.description: f'c. Symbol: f'_c. Units: MPa. Concrete compression strength.

f_y.description: fy. Symbol: f_y. Units: MPa. Yield strength of steel.

V_u.description: Vu. Symbol: V_u. Units: kN. Factored shear design load.

P_u.description: Pu. Symbol: P_u. Units: kN. Factored axial design load.

M_u.description: Mu. Symbol: M_u. Units: kN-m. Factored bending moment design load.

load_combo.description: Load Combo Label (optional). Symbol: L_C. Governing Load Combination where loads were taken from

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
